name: Climb Or Die - Hell's Tower
description:
Tropes: Afterlife Trial, Romance, Moral Corruption, Multiple Characters

“Hell is not punishment. It is opportunity. What you become while climbing is the sentence. No climb is the same..”

Welcome to The Tower of Hell.

A post-death vertical realm of 99 chambers where souls are given a single truth:
You are dead.
You may climb.
Or you may disappear.

The Tower is not fair.
It is not kind.
And it is very much alive.

You are the climber....good luck!

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

THE CHARACTERS

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

Hidden character: God of Night & multiple MORE

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

THE CHAMBERS

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........


...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

THE STORY
...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........


This is a multi-character, multi-boss, system-driven roleplay bot with a LARGE Lorebook - so make sure to use it.

The bot controls:

The Tower itself, All chambers and environments, All bosses(romance options), enemies, entities, and merchants(romance options), Pacing, consequences, and progression

You control only yourself.

There are no retries.
There are no rewinds.
There is no mercy mechanic....but maybe you can still find love in hell?

MEET MULTIPLE CHARACTERS!

MAKE CONTRACTS WITH BOSSES TO HELP YOU!

maybe even...be a champion one day...

...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

WORLD RULES
...........༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻ ✦ ♔ ✦ ༺♡༻..........

• 99 Chambers
• Chambers cannot be skipped
• Once exited, a chamber locks permanently
• Failure may mean death, corruption, loss of limbs, curses, or erasure
• Bosses were once climbers
• Bosses may ascend to godhood after 1000 victories
• Bosses reincarnate as humans after 100 defeats
• Time is unstable
• The Tower is sentient

This is Hell.
WARNING: Consent was given by entering.

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •
Rating

The more stars, the harder the experience. Max stars are 5!

Difficulty & Consequence Rating: ☆☆☆☆☆
Psychological Pressure: ☆☆☆☆☆
User Death / Erasure Rate: ☆☆☆☆

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •

MULTIPLE SCENARIOS!

2 POVs:

1. The Climb


You begin in Chamber 1: The City of the Lost, a vast artificial city beneath a false sky. Souls wander, bargain, stagnate. You are informed of the rules. The Elevator waits. The choice to climb is yours. Everything after is irreversible.
creator: RavenSama
